What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Athletes wearing black or dark athletic uniforms walk and stand on a red running track surface. Spectators sit in metal bleachers located in the background behind the athletes. Bright stadium floodlights illuminate the field during the night. Orange coolers and white goalposts are positioned near the track area. Some athletes wear race bibs on their chests while moving.

canonical_answer: At 0s, a green title card displays white text; at 6s, a person in red walks left on the track; at 10s, an athlete in black stands with hands on hips; at 16s, the athlete in black begins running across the field; at 18s, the athlete slows to a walk wearing a white bib.
